description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, dressed in a casual, urban style. He wears a long-sleeve raglan sweatshirt with contrasting sleeves and a pair of knee-length shorts. His footwear consists of low-top sneakers, and his hands are relaxed at his sides. The figure has short, closely-cropped hair and a neatly groomed beard. The overall appearance suggests a relaxed pedestrian, suitable for a city street or park environment.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a sweatshirt, shorts, and sneakers, standing upright with relaxed arms. He has short hair and a beard, embodying a typical urban pedestrian.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, sweatshirt details, and shorts, with both arms visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side of the sweatshirt, and the length of the shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the full back of the sweatshirt, and the shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm, and leg, mirroring the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve sweatshirt and knee-length shorts
